task.title: Update Dashboard Templates
task.description: Update the dashboard templates to show new analytics widgets. Templates are in templates/dashboard/ directory.
constraints: Only modify files in templates/dashboard/ directory
Do not change templates in other directories

steps.thought: Let me check the dashboard templates directory structure.
steps.observation:
drwxr-xr-x 2 user user 4096 Dec  6 16:00 .
drwxr-xr-x 5 user user 4096 Dec  6 15:55 ..
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user 2048 Dec  6 15:55 index.html
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user 1024 Dec  6 15:55 widgets.html
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user  768 Dec  6 15:55 analytics.html

steps.thought: Let me examine the current dashboard index template.
I'll update the dashboard to include analytics widgets with inline styling.
Now I'll enhance the analytics template with the new widgets.

steps.thought: Let me verify the template syntax is correct.
steps.observation: System check identified no issues (0 silenced).

steps.thought: Dashboard templates updated successfully with all changes in templates/dashboard/.

arguments.message: Dashboard templates updated successfully. Added analytics section to index.html with inline CSS styling for widgets. Enhanced analytics.html with three new widgets (Active Users, Revenue, Orders Today) including default values and descriptions. Added auto-refresh JavaScript for real-time updates. All styling and functionality contained within templates/dashboard/ directory using block extra_css and inline scripts.
